mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SRBA_CUST_I ( BAS_YYMM , CS_NO , CS_NM , BTYMD , UNAGE_YN , NTN_CD , INDV_CORP_CCD , INDST_RSK_DVD_CD , JOB_C , PEP_YN , LG_AMT_ASTS_YN , NPRFT_GROUP_YN , LSTNG_YN , NFR_DIT_YN , RSDNC_YN , NEW_CUST_YN , UN_TRN_YN , STR_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , RA_CLNT_CLSS_CODE --RA고객분류코드 , RSDN_CNTRY_CODE --거주국가코드 , CS_RGST_DT , ENCRP_RNMCNO ) SELECT /*+ ORDERED FULL(M) PARALLEL(M 16) */ #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM ,A.CS_NO ,A.CS_NM ,(SELECT BRTDY FROM NIC02B WHERE RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO) AS BTYMD --생년월일 ,(SELECT MIN_AGE_F FROM NIC02B WHERE RNMCNO = A.RNMCNO) AS UNAGE_YN --미성연자여부 ,A.NTN_CD --국가코드 ,A.INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 ,A.INDST_RSK_DVD_CD --업종코드 ,A.AML_JOB_GUBN --직업코드_M009 ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(A.CS_NO),0,'0','1') FROM IC_TBL_DGRS_SRCH_CNF B WHERE B.ENCRP_RMNNO = A.RNMCNO AND B.KYC_DGRS_PTN_CODE = '04' AND B.DGRS_YN = '1' AND B.AGRM_YN = '1' ) AS PEP_YN --PEP 여부 ,A.LG_AMT_ASTS_F AS LG_AMT_ASTS_YN --고액자산여부 --,A.NPRFT_GROUP_F AS NPRFT_GROUP_YN --비영리단체여부 ,C.N_PRF_COPT_REG_YN AS NPRFT_GROUP_YN --비영리단체여부 ..비영리법인등록여부 ,A.LSTNG_F AS LSTNG_YN --실소유자여부 ,A.NTV_FGNR_CCD --내외국인구분코드_A008 ,A.RSDNC_F --거주여부_M005 ,A.NEW_CLNT_YN AS NEW_CUST_YN --신규고객여부 ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(A.CS_NO),0,'0','1') FROM NIC66B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SSPS_TYP_CD = 'R030' --혐의유형코드 ) AS UN_TRN_YN --불공정거래적발여부 ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(A.CS_NO),0,'0','1') FROM NIC66B B WHERE A.RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} AND SSPS_TYP_CD IN ('R004', 'R005') ) AS STR_YN --의심거래보고이력여부 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') ,nvl(C.RA_CLNT_CLSS_CODE ,' ') AS RA_CLNT_CLSS_CODE ,nvl(C.RSDN_CNTRY_CODE,' ') AS RSDN_CNTRY_CODE , A.CS_RGST_DT , A.RNMCNO
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CS_NO --CS_NO --ENCRP_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO 로바꾸기 FROM (SELECT DISTINCT M.CS_NO --CS_NO --ENCRP_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO 로바꾸기 FROM SRBA_TRN_I M WHERE 1=1 AND DL_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT M.CS_NO --CS_NO --RNMCNO 로바꾸기 FROM NIC17B M WHERE 1=1 AND M.AC_OPN_DT BETWEEN #{tgtTrnSdt} AND #{tgtTrnEdt} --계좌개설일자 ) ) M, NIC01B A LEFT OUTER JOIN IC_TBM_CDD_CLNT C ON C.ENCRP_RMNNO = A.RNMCNO WHERE 1=1 AND M.CS_NO = A.CS_NO ----CS_NO --RNMCNO 로바꾸기
